data.interface_name: According  SN to  get real-time power data
data.interface_content:
##### A brief description

- Get real-time power data based on SN

##### Request URL
- `https://openapi.alphaess.com/api/getLastPowerData`
  
##### Request method
-GET
##### Headers parameters
|Parameter name|Required|Type|Description|
|:---- |:---|:----- |----- |
|appId |Yes |string |Developer ID, click Development Management, select the Developer Information menu to find "Developer ID (AppID)" |
|timeStamp | is |long| unix timestamp, used to confirm the validity period of the request. If the difference between the request timestamp and the server time is greater than 300 seconds, it will be rejected. Please refer to the address: https://tool.lu/timestamp/, timestamp Accurate to the second level, ten digits in total |
|sign | is |string | appId+appSecret+timestamp, SHA512 encrypted. For example: appId: alphaef7900ee81dbbce9, appSecret: c2d2ef6c047c49678e2c332fb2d74c3c, timeStamp: 1676353875, before encryption: alphaef7900ee81dbbce9c2d2ef6c047c49678e2c332fb2d74c3c1 676353875, after SHA512 encryption: 0f023c2287b8f6b21b0994947465f8e9de0e1542567b1735bdc6c427336b9b6406285cd94f9215c3e9af958df37fb11c2c9fe792713d 8afbdb8c463359a1add8|

##### Request parameter description

|Parameter name|Required|Type|Description|
|:---- |:---|:----- |----- |
|sysSn | is |string | system SN |


##### Return parameter description

|Parameter name|||Type|Description|
|:---- |:---- |:----|:----- |----- |
|code|| | int|Return status. If 200 is returned, the operation is successful. If other codes are returned, you need to check the return code to indicate the description corresponding to this code. |
|msg|| | string|Return information|
|data|| | data|return data set|
|——|ppv| | decimal|Pv total power, unit: W
|——|ppvDetail|| Data|Data entity
|——|——|ppv1| decimal|ppv1
|——|——|ppv2| decimal|ppv2
|——|——|ppv3| decimal|ppv3
|——|——|ppv4| decimal|ppv4
|——|——|pmeterDc| decimal|pmeterDc
|——|pload| |decimal |Load, unit: W
|——|soc| | decimal|soc
|——|pgrid| | decimal|When pgrid is positive, it means taking electricity from the mains; when pgrid is negative, it means selling electricity. Unit:W
|——|pgridDetail|| Data|data entity
|——|——|pmeterL1| decimal|pmeterL1
|——|——|pmeterL2| decimal|pmeterL2
|——|——|pmeterL3| decimal|pmeterL3
|——|pbat| |decimal |Battery power, unit: W
|——|prealL1| |decimal |prealL1
|——|prealL2| |decimal |prealL2
|——|prealL3| |decimal |prealL3
|——|pev| | decimal|Total power of charging pile, unit: W
|——|pevDetail|| Data|Data entity
|——|——|ev1Power| decimal|ev1Power
|——|——|ev2Power| decimal|ev2Power
|——|——|ev3Power| decimal|ev3Power
|——|——|ev4Power| decimal|ev4Power
